evidence: "A little too 'out there', but still enjoyed it."
"Story could not decide on what it wanted to do. Tried to do too much, and did it poorly."
"Have only just started first season, but is BORING!!. Very little movement and tries to be too dramatic."
"Definitely low budget and did it show."
"Was very bit as enjoyable as it was when the first time around on TV."
"It is worth watching, but don't make a special effort."

summary: The user enjoys sci-fi content but has a low tolerance for complex narratives and slow pacing, often finding them boring. They seem to prioritize entertainment over production quality and do not show strong loyalty to specific creators.
